UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user of the SafeCity Guardian application.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

reputation.description: The user's reputation score, starting at 10.

neighborhood.description: The neighborhood the user is subscribed to for local alerts.

IncidentReport.title: IncidentReport
IncidentReport.description: Represents a report of an incident submitted by a user.

userId.description: Reference to the user who submitted the report. (Relationship: User 1:N IncidentReport)

incidentType.description: The type of incident reported (e.g., robbery, vandalism).

location.description: The location where the incident occurred.

riskLevel.description: The risk level associated with the incident (low, medium, high).

reportTime.description: The date and time when the incident was reported.

status.description: The verification status of the report.

confirmations.description: List of user IDs who confirmed this report.

disputes.description: List of user IDs who disputed this report.

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: Represents a notification for a user.

userId.description: The ID of the user this notification is for.

type.description: The type of notification (e.g., reputation_gain, reputation_loss, report_confirmed).

timestamp.description: The time the notification was created.

read.description: Whether the user has read the notification.

Interaction.title: Interaction
Interaction.description: Represents a single user interaction (e.g., a click) for heatmap analysis.

ButtonStats.title: ButtonStats
ButtonStats.description: Tracks click counts for individual interactive elements.

UserStats.title: UserStats
UserStats.description: Tracks aggregate statistics for a single user.

GlobalConfig.title: GlobalConfig
GlobalConfig.description: Stores global configuration and aggregate metrics for the platform.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profile information including their role for authorization.

/incidentReports/{incidentReportId}.description: Stores all incident reports. Access is controlled by roles defined in user profiles.

/users/{userId}/notifications/{notificat.description: Stores notifications for a specific user.

/interacciones/{interactionId}.description: Stores individual click events for heatmap analysis.

/stats_botones/{elementId}.description: Stores click counts for specific UI elements, identified by their HTML ID.

/stats_usuarios/{userId}.description: Stores aggregate interaction statistics for each user.

/config/dashboard.description: A singleton document for storing global platform-wide metrics.
